title: DOJ files denaturalization complaints against 3 U.S. citizens
description_html: DOJ filed civil denaturalization complaints in federal court against three individuals who allegedly obtained their naturalized U.S. citizenship by fraud. Each of the three individuals had been U.S. citizens for over 10 years. Two Pakistan-born and one India-born individuals’ alleged frauds involved concealing their prior orders of exclusion and deportation under different identities than the identity under which they naturalized. [ID #611]
